title: Ability to edit item name based on status change through automations
excerpt:
A specific use case for this request is we have a workflow with a status of cancelled. When an item is moved to canceled, we would like the item name to be changed to “CANCELED + Existing Item Name” through automations. 
…

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
A specific use case for this request is we have a workflow with a status of cancelled. When an item is moved to canceled, we would like the item name to be changed to “CANCELED + Existing Item Name” through automations.

Feel free to comment other use cases for this feature and don’t forget to vote!

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @kaylak,

You can actually do this with the Icons app. Here is a quick demo of how
